violations.text: Gaskets for 1 door reach-in cooler was observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2025
Gaskets for 1 door reach-in cooler were observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025
Single service items were observed stored on the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 03/15/2024

Dishwasher located in the main kitchen area was not in good repair. Employees are using a residential dishwasher at the basement level to wash, rinse and sanitized. The establishment will contact their service provider to inspect and repair the dishwasher. Switched to disposable paper/plastic service is recomended. New Violation. Correct By: 03/15/2024

Refrigerator unit at the main kitchen was not in good repair. Not food items stored on unit at the time of the inspection. Person in charge will call inspector for update. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2023

Cut pineapple and ambient temperature of the kitchen refrigerator unit was observed held at43-44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items were moved to other refrigeration unit. Service should be call. No PHF's can be held in unit until a temperature of 41 degrees or below is maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2023
